Nud-mekhem, the east-gate, can be found to the west of Muru Azog. Hoping to rout the last of the Orcs at Azanulbizar, King Thráin has asked you to inv…
Hermáth Stormhammer can be found at Amdân. You have witnessed the end of the Battle of Azanulbizar. You should talk to Hermáth Stormhammer.
